name: CFN Enterprises Inc.
summary: CFN Enterprises Inc. owns and operates CFN Media, a digital marketing agency providing compliant, turnkey ad campaigns for the cannabis, hemp, and wellness industries, and Ranco, a white label manufacturing and co-packing business. CFN Media generates revenue through ad campaigns, sponsored content, articles, videos, and podcasts. Ranco provides co-packing, white label manufacturing, 3PL logistics, custom packaging, and media services, and holds an exclusive licensing agreement for Packwoods-branded hemp and nicotine products.

products.name: CFN Media
products.description: Digital marketing agency offering compliant, turnkey ad campaigns, sponsored content, and investor-focused media for cannabis, hemp, and wellness industries.

products.name: Ranco Co-Packing
products.description: White label manufacturing, co-packing, 3PL logistics, custom packaging, and media/design services for cannabis, hemp, and wellness industries.

products.name: Packwoods Private Label Products
products.description: Exclusive manufacturing, packaging, and distribution of hemp-based inhalable, edible, and nicotine vaporizer products under the Packwoods brand.

products.name: E-commerce Network
products.description: Launching e-commerce network focused on sale of general wellness CBD products.

products.name: CannabisFN.com
products.description: Online media platform educating and informing investors interested in the cannabis industry.

partnerships.description: Exclusive 5-year licensing agreement for manufacturing, packaging, and distribution of Packwoods-branded hemp and nicotine products.
